## Anthony's wish list

This project tries to stay tiny. The features I'm most likely to merge are:

- A real Metal-based aquarium simulator that knows global display geometry.
- An `.app` bundle build.
- A native `.saver` bundle for System Settings → Screen Saver.
- More CC-licensed source videos people can swap in.

If your idea is one of those, link existing prior art if you can.

## Anything you'd add to scope, or take out?
